h85e86135ga109g42a2g9f05g4623df23e12f: Believe it or not, but I witnessed a similar standoff back at The Yawning Portal.
hcf54eb6ega680g42ffg8f3fg4567d4f3d3ee: Of course, an establishment like that invites all sorts of outlandish entertainments.
h8216ab79ge34dg4fe8g8d87ga236feab6882: An inn in Waterdeep. Never a dull moment there. Adventurers come from all over Faerûn to try their luck down the well:
hcb0d7946gb241g4e7dgb8dbg75b4f5b5a9ce: Leads into the Undermountain, you see - full of death, danger, and vast amounts of treasure. Hard to resist.
h66fc3773g01e7g4d96g8b60g9c6e0f21fdd5: Oh, a drow, a dragonborn, and a cleric of Cyric walk into a bar. Your standard fare.
h2239e339gd75ag4fe5gb03eg59232db3c454: Maybe someone was cheating at cards, maybe it was some weird lovers' quarrel.
hb6b2337bgf378g460dg9594g75220753987c: In any case, out came the crossbow, and a hush fell over the entire room.
hab5fe7acge950g45dcg95bfg55ce44a3ff9b: I stood up and yelled: 'Shadowdark ale for everyone!'
ha7b3e6ecg1b0ag42c4gb993g4ee754dde246: The crowd cheered, the tension drained into five dozen tankards, and soon all was well again.
h6f37e96eg8ee6g47edga05dgbb787f4d629d: In a place like the Yawning Portal, the most powerful magic is calling for a round of drinks.
h0c39e182gaa81g42bcg914egbab2655c1ba4: Mind you, all I did was call for ale, but you went and stood in front of that crossbow.
h0b31f11dg48ddg4ee4ga958gf012bf10d023: Mind you, all I did was call for ale, but one of ours went and stood in front of that crossbow.
h531f4a6bg5857g49b9gb6cdg888890f7a6ee: Please tell me a shot was fired.
h99ffa438gece4g43c0g8d47g83f8ff406859: No, no, no. Yours truly defused the situation.
hc3bde9d1gcf35g4346g8411g70c81cc6ca42: You know what? I don't actually care how this story ends.
h12e72bd1g55c1g474agbfc8g520cd3297c11: Suit yourself. I was merely going to remark that you handled yourself pretty well.
h010ee134gb200g4660gad90g73e564eaa012: Suit yourself. I was merely going to remark that we handled ourselves pretty well.
hbc17e7d1geba0g490bgb80cg4a524aa32c05: I'm not in the mood for anecdotes.
